import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    # Tile and color constants
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2
    FLOOR = 1

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Find yellow pyramid position in grid
    pyr_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    pyr_count = jnp.sum(pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count, 1.0)
    pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(pyr_count, 1.0)

    # Find green square position in grid
    sq_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    sq_count = jnp.sum(sq_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    sq_y = jnp.sum(yy * sq_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count, 1.0)
    sq_x = jnp.sum(xx * sq_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(sq_count, 1.0)

    # Agent position
    agent_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Check if agent is holding yellow pyramid
    holding_pyramid = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Distance from agent to yellow pyramid (when not holding it)
    dist_agent_to_pyr = jnp.abs(agent_y - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - pyr_x)

    # Distance from agent to green square (when holding pyramid)
    dist_agent_to_sq = jnp.abs(agent_y - sq_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - sq_x)

    # Manhattan distance between yellow pyramid and green square (when placed)
    dist_pyr_to_sq = jnp.abs(pyr_y - sq_y) + jnp.abs(pyr_x - sq_x)

    # Success: yellow pyramid is adjacent (Manhattan distance == 1) to green square
    # and not held by agent
    pyr_in_grid = pyr_count > 0.5
    sq_in_grid = sq_count > 0.5
    not_holding = ~holding_pyramid
    adjacent = (dist_pyr_to_sq < 1.5) & (dist_pyr_to_sq > 0.5)  # distance == 1
    success = pyr_in_grid & sq_in_grid & not_holding & adjacent

    # Dense reward shaping
    # Normalize distances by grid size
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Phase 1: approach pyramid (not holding)
    approach_pyr_reward = (max_dist - dist_agent_to_pyr) / max_dist

    # Phase 2: approach square (holding pyramid)
    approach_sq_reward = (max_dist - dist_agent_to_sq) / max_dist

    # Phase 3: proximity of pyramid to square (when placed)
    # Only meaningful when pyramid is in grid and not held
    pyr_sq_proximity = jnp.where(
        pyr_in_grid & sq_in_grid & not_holding,
        (max_dist - dist_pyr_to_sq) / max_dist,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Milestone: picked up pyramid
    pickup_bonus = jnp.where(holding_pyramid, jnp.float32(0.3), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Combine rewards
    # When not holding: reward for approaching pyramid + proximity if already placed
    # When holding: reward for approaching square
    dense_reward = jnp.where(
        holding_pyramid,
        approach_sq_reward * 0.1 + pickup_bonus,
        approach_pyr_reward * 0.05 + pyr_sq_proximity * 0.2
    )

    # Success reward
    success_reward = jnp.where(success, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    total_reward = dense_reward + success_reward
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
